steps.voice: Here's the fast tour. On first boot, RDM7 scans your CAN bus at four common bitrates and auto-picks the one your ECU is using. In this demo it found 500 kilobits.
Tap Apply to lock in the detected bitrate.
Next, pick your ECU. Presets cover Haltech, Link ECU, MaxxECU, MegaSquirt, ECU Master, and Ford Falcon. Haltech Nexus / Elite is selected here.
Finally, connect. Join WiFi for the web editor, plug into USB for the desktop app, or use the built-in hotspot as a fallback.
Dashboard is ready — under a minute from power-on.
And here it is live: RPM, speed, gear, throttle, coolant — the default layout driving your ECU data.
